phone_presence_notes: Daniel maintained a patient, consultative tone across a long complex call and used the customer's name at natural touchpoints, though he referred to her as 'Catherine' (from the form) rather than 'Katie' (her preferred name).
top_strength: Complete Save Your Ass delivery and perfect bonus — Smart Move Checklist, wrapping tips, walkthrough guidance, every FAQ addressed.
coaching_note: Only consistent gap is the booking close — 'reply with corrections,' hours, and bolded email summary would push him to near-perfect.
